name: Affiliated Managers Group, Inc.
description: Affiliated Managers Group, Inc. is a leading global asset management company that operates through a partnership approach, investing in leading independent, partner-owned investment management firms, known as Affiliates. AMG provides strategic capabilities to support its Affiliates' growth, including global distribution, business development, and operational support, while preserving their investment autonomy and distinct cultures. Through its Affiliates, AMG manages assets for institutional and retail clients worldwide across a diverse range of active, return-seeking investment strategies.
